raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX charges made to my credit card - Barclays XXXX XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX XXXX, XXXX PA {$1000.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX PA {$1400.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX PA {$1200.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - XXXX CA {$92.00} Was notified via alert of potential fraud activity from CC company, called company on XX/XX/XXXX and confirmed these XXXX charges were not made by myself or the other authorized user. Card was reported and closed for Fraud. Card has been in my possession entire time. 
Investigation was opened and XXXX charges were reversed. 
XX/XX/XXXX XXXX charges were put back through account. 
No action was taken on XXXX XXXX charges. 
XX/XX/XXXX noted charges were on account again, called CC company, was advised that investigation was completed and charges found to be valid. 
Told representative that the charges were not made by account owner/auth rep. CC company reopened the case. 
XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX purchase was reversed but later in day email was received advising that the charge was valid. 
No additional reversals have been made to the XXXX charges. 
Called XXXX, they were unable to provide any detail over the phone. 
Will be filing a police report at my local police station and am continuing to deal with CC Company.
